title: lantana camara f. sanguinea
intro: Lantana camara f. sanguinea, also known as the red flowered buttonbush or wild sage, is a flowering plant species that is native to tropical regions of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lantana camara f. sanguinea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
